policy: A missing item blocks the affected solver study; it is never replaced by an inherited or fitted value.

items.detail: Layer-mapped n(lambda), k(lambda) files for PMMA/perovskite/SnO2/NiOx/FTO/Ni/Al2O3/Ag; main paper only cites refs. 41-43.
Incidence angle, polarization and source normalization are not stated.
PML thickness and optical mesh are not stated.
Periodic ports/Floquet exist in the repository; PML and full QIBC domain-loss extraction need server verification.
Paper G(x,y) raw data are not published; flat G(z) is not an equivalent replacement.
Voltage range, step, bias sign and continuation settings are not stated.
Electrical horizontal periodic BC is reported, but no verified Semiconductor API call exists in this repository.
Radiative and Auger coefficients are reported, but their COMSOL feature/API path is not verified.
Dit mapping requires capture cross sections and thermal velocity or the authors' direct interface model.
The Nt sweep requires capture cross sections and thermal velocity or the authors' exact Nt-to-lifetime model.
Most plot marker grids and heatmap grids are not published.
Map operating voltages are not stated.
The exact normalization denominator for integrated-current and normalized current maps is not stated.
Table S2 supplies offsets and resulting PCE only; complete material properties and fixed Fermi-level conditions are not supplied.
Ion mobility/diffusion, initial distribution, blocking BC, bias history and steady-state constraints are not stated; Fig. 6d-f itself is reported at short circuit.
No executed COMSOL/MPh ion-coupling API path exists in this project.
Front/rear spectral absorptance and spatial re-injection coupling are not supplied.
Roadmap case 4 geometry and optical inputs are not defined.
